taxonomy: Oligogynium constrictum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It belongs to the tribe Ipomoeoideae and is closely related to other morning glory species. The classification of Oligogynium constrictum is further divided into the genus Oligogynium, which is a small group of plants native to the Americas. Within the genus Oligogynium, O. constrictum is a distinct species with unique characteristics. The classification of O. constrictum is subject to ongoing research and revision in the field of botany.
